name: Bugcrowd Web.com Bug Bounty

submission_gate.current_rule: Bugcrowd previously displayed a verification requirement before submissions could be enabled for this engagement.
submission_gate.operator_action: Confirm the Submit report page is enabled before any final submission.

authorized_scope.notes: Only the listed root website is in scope. The wildcard *.networksolutions.com is out of scope.
Only the listed root website is in scope. The wildcard *.bluehost.com is out of scope.
Only the listed root website is in scope. The wildcard *.hostgator.com is out of scope.

forbidden_scope: Any asset not explicitly listed in authorized_scope
rate_and_noise_limits: Keep scanning during regular business hours (PDT) to a minimum.
Do not perform DoS, DDoS, or availability-impacting behavior.
Do not interact with real customers or real customer accounts.

tool_policy.security_core_plan: allowed for reasoning and non-live planning
tool_policy.hexstrike_lab_scan: allowed only for loopback lab targets, not this production program
tool_policy.web_fetch: allowed for official policy pages and documentation only, not as an active scanner
tool_policy.agent_delegate: may plan or review under this target card, but inherits all scope and active-testing blocks

first_safe_task.title: Web.com bug bounty scope understanding
first_safe_task.objective: Teach FATHIYA the exact current Web.com Bugcrowd scope and produce a target-specific passive plan without live scanning.
first_safe_task.expected_result: Agent states the three in-scope assets, the out-of-scope wildcards, required header, identity gate status, and stop conditions.

reporting_channel: Bugcrowd Web.com engagement submissions after the Submit report page is visible and enabled
